content.en:
Ye Tian didn't care about the matter of the fourth dark holy land.

Eventually, part of the territory of the Fourth Dark Holy Land was occupied by the Terrans, and the other forces did not dare to say anything.

Even if the Terrans completely occupied the Fourth Holy Land, the other ancestors had nothing to say, after all, the Terrans were indeed too powerful.

......

"Cultivation is getting slower and slower!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

Although the copy body was still trying to collect resources from the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth, it was still not enough for him to use.

As a result, the cultivation of the ontology is improving more and more slowly, and many resources are of little use to him, making it difficult to improve his strength.

"Maybe you can try trading with the Bone Clan!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Bone Clan is very powerful, and has countless resources, if he trades with the Bone Clan, he can completely benefit from the Bone Clan, or a lot of precious resources, which is very helpful for him to improve his strength.

this day.

Ye Tian's body personally descended on the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

When Ye Tian appeared in the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, the entire Bone Sea Forbidden Land began to shake.

Suddenly, those bone clan powerhouses were terrified.

"The Ancestor !!! the Strongest"

They panicked.

The Supreme Ancestor was a powerful existence comparable to the Bone Emperor, and they couldn't compete with it.

Moreover, the Bone Emperor is about to descend, and his strength will also decrease, and he may not be able to compete with a supreme ancestor.

This is a real disaster!

Of course, many bone clans also recognized Ye Tian, who was the top ancestor who had invaded the Bone Sea Forbidden Land many times a long time ago, but now he had been promoted to the strongest ancestor.

"Respected Supreme Ancestor, you have signed an agreement with the Bone Emperor of our clan not to invade the Bone Sea Forbidden Land again!" a Bone King suppressed the panic in his heart and spoke.

"I'm not an enemy of your bone clan, I'm just here to negotiate a deal!"

Ye Tian said.

Trade?

Many powerhouses of the Bone Clan were puzzled, and they didn't know what Ye Tian was going to trade.

In the past, they had never traded with the ancestors of the Dark Forbidden Realm, because in their eyes, the creatures of the Dark Forbidden Realm were ants to be slaughtered.

When they arrived on the day of the Great Tribulation, they had no resources and were completely left to their harvest, so they looked down on the weak Dark Forbidden Domain Ancestors at all, and naturally they would not trade with them.

Besides, once the transaction is made, it is equivalent to increasing the strength of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and if a large number of top ancestors are born, wouldn't it be troublesome for yourself?

Therefore, it is impossible for the powerhouses of other foreign lands to trade with the ancestors of the Dark Forbidden Realm, unless the Dark Forbidden Realm can come up with good things that the powerhouses of the Dark Forbidden Realm cannot refuse.

But now that Ye Tian has stepped into the realm of the strongest ancestor, he is naturally qualified to trade with the bone clan.

"Respected Supreme Ancestor, let us report to the Bone Emperor, we can't be the master of the transaction!"

The Bone King hurriedly said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He didn't trade with these bone kings, and some of the bone kings couldn't get anything good, so it didn't help him much.

After all, with his current realm of the strongest ancestor, even the Bone King Bone Bead would not be of great help to him.

It didn't take long for the Bone Emperor's wisps of billions of years to pass through the portal and come to the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

This idea incarnation does not have much power, but the price paid is not large, after all, it is not here to fight, and there is no need to pay a huge price for the real body to come.

"What do you want from me?"

The Bone Emperor of the Bone Clan asked lightly, but he was very shocked in his heart.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was able to cultivate to the extreme of the top ancestor, he was not surprised at all, although Ye Tian's combat power was too amazing, and he had created so many defensive ultimate ancestor skills, but if he couldn't step into the realm of the supreme ancestor in one day, it would not be comparable to an existence like him.

But now how long has it been, Ye Tian has actually stepped into the realm of the strongest ancestor, and judging from the breath, it is not that he has just broken through, but that he has already stabilized the realm.

If you want to break through to the realm of the strongest ancestor, you can't break through by penance, you must leave the dark forbidden realm and go to another exotic world, so as to comprehend the rules of another exotic world, and then take the path of the exotic, the two paths can be fused, and you can break the shackles and step into the realm of the supreme ancestor.

He didn't know how many doors there were in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Maybe Ye Tian had passed through a door by luck, and the exotic world on the other side of the door happened to be in the midst of a catastrophe.

No matter what the situation is, it is enough to show that Ye Tian is extremely against the sky regardless of luck and talent, otherwise he would not be able to step into the realm of the strongest ancestor.

Ye Tian stepped into the realm of the strongest ancestor, at least in the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, their bone clan could not help Ye Tian.

"I want to trade some resources with the Bone Clan, I know that the resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain are very useful to your Bone Clan, and some of the resources of your Bone Clan are also very helpful to me, wouldn't it be better for us to trade with each other?" Ye Tian proposed.

"Our Bone Ancestor is currently not short of resources!"

The Bone Emperor wanted to refuse.

He didn't want to increase the strength of the Dark Forbidden Realm, it wouldn't do him any good.

"Bone Emperor, don't refuse yet, presumably the Bone Clan doesn't want to offend a Supreme Ancestor, right? And I'm willing to use the resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain and other resources of other foreign lands to trade with the Bone Clan. In addition, I have already taken another Exotic Realm, although it is a very weak Exotic Realm, but the Dark Forbidden Realm will give birth to more powerful ancestors in the future, although I have signed an agreement with your Bone Clan, I will not make a move against the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, but others have not signed an agreement. If the Bone Clan is willing to trade with me, I can guarantee that the other Supreme Ancestors will not attack the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, and can permanently retain the existence of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, how about it?" Ye Tian proposed.

"What, you Dark Forbidden Realm have taken over an Exotic World?"

The Bone Emperor couldn't believe it.

However, the Dark Forbidden Domain at least had a base in another Exotic Heaven and Earth, that was for sure, otherwise Ye Tian would not have been able to impact the Supreme Ancestor Realm.

It is conceivable that in the future, the Dark Forbidden Domain will definitely give birth to more Supreme Ancestors.

If this is the case, the Dark Forbidden Land can really completely destroy the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

Now, it is no longer possible to suppress the rise of the Dark Forbidden Domain, it is better to trade with the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"Okay, I agree!"

The Bone Emperor responded.

Next, Ye Tian made a deal with the Bone Emperor of the Bone Clan.

I saw that the Bone Emperor took out a lot of resources, and Ye Tian tried to refine them one by one, only trading the resources that helped him a lot.

After some trading, Ye Tian took out a large amount of dark forbidden domain resources, anyway, these resources were not of much help to him, and it could even be said that they were not of any help, which was equivalent to waste utilization.

And he obtained a huge amount of useful resources from the Bone Clan, and of course the same is true for the Bone Clan.

At last.

"Bone Emperor, do you Bone Clan have the cultivation secrets of the Bone Emperor level, I have just stepped into the realm of the strongest ancestor, I don't know much about this level, if you have it, I can take out some resources to trade. Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, but I'll only trade some basic information for you, and I won't trade you for really useful secrets!" said the Bone Emperor.

Immediately, Ye Tian used some resources to trade a manual from the Bone Emperor, and this manual was naturally temporarily engraved by the Bone Emperor, which recorded some information about the Bone Emperor.

Whether it is the Bone Emperor or the Supreme Ancestor, they are actually the same level, and they naturally have something in common.

After the transaction was completed, Ye Tian happily left the Bone Sea Forbidden Land and returned to the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.
